  "findings": [
    "Pressure gauge calibration has expired, invalidating the pressure test results."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the pressure test results.",
    "Replace the expired pressure gauge with a recently calibrated and certified gauge.",
    "Re-perform the pressure test in accordance with ASME B31.3 requirements."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under ASME B31.3 and standard commercial inspection practices, test equipment such as pressure gauges must have current, documented calibration to ensure the accuracy and safety of the pressure test. An expired calibration tag invalidates the test.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B31.3 §345"
  ]
